sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40231" key="e)pimici/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-μιξία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπί-μιξις</orth>, <sense id="n40231.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπι-μειξία, -μειξις</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
